body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: capability-mixin composition on the coding worker
body.intention: I intend that the mixin composition on DickSimnel changed how the capability is exposed, not what the worker produces — verified by observing DS.0 in production after the change.
body.description:
**What changed:** DickSimnel's coding inference now flows through a composed `CodingCapability` mixin (delegating to `CodingDomain.run()`) instead of a direct `resolve_domain('coding').run()` call (T-codebuilder-compose-ds, on the mechanism from T-capability-mixin-coding-capability).

**Predicted unintended effects to watch:**
- MRO / __init__ cooperation: mixing CodingCapability into DickSimnelDevice adds a base to the MRO. If the mixin's __init__ (or domain resolution) doesn't cooperate with the existing DickSimnel/BaseDevice super() chain, device construction could silently drop a step. Watch for DS.0 failing to start or missing a normal init side-effect.
- Delegation identity: confirm the mixin passes ticket + agent_id unchanged — a dropped/renamed kwarg would silently change escalation behavior (agent_id feeds the escalation walk / system_alarm HALT).
- Double-resolve: if the mixin resolves the domain per-call while DS also holds a reference, watch for two CodingDomain instances / duplicated state.

**Signals to watch:**
- DS.0 dispatch still produces DONE results with same escalation behavior on a real coding ticket (no new HALTs).
- The `capability: delegating to domain=coding` INFO line appears once per inference (not zero, not twice).
- No new errors in ~/.unseen_university/logs/dicksimnel/ after the change ships.

**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-07-16 (after stream A ships and DS.0 has run real tickets), or when stream B introduces Agent(BaseDevice) — whichever comes first.

**Affected files:** none — observation/verification only.
**Test plan:** no tests — observation ticket; annotate outcome occurred/clear/partial and close.
**Scope boundary:** observe predicted effects of the composition on the live worker; does NOT cover stream B (Agent subclass / rename).
